notes:

title: June's Journey - Zoek-en-vind
notes:
REIS LANGS HET ERFGOED - Reis mee langs vergeten mysteries. Ga samen met June en Virginia naar het Midwesten, verzamel beloningen en speel de hele maand tijdgebonden thema-evenementen.

JUNE'S FOTODAGBOEK - Ontdek het geweldige gloednieuwe evenement waarin June haar herinneringen bij elkaar puzzelt. Voltooi vijf foto's om verloren museumstukken te herstellen en unieke beloningen te ontvangen.

title: Match Villains
notes:
Fireworks up, summer on. 100 new levels await!

NEW ITEM: LAVA BORDER! The board looks quiet… maybe too quiet. Make matches and reveal what’s hiding under the heat.

NEW EVENT: MUSEUM BREAK! Tick-tock, Villains. Move deeper into the museum, grab the rewards, and try not to look too suspicious.

NEW SAFE CRACKERS: JULY FOURTH! Crack safes and unlock a firework-ready NEW STYLE.

NEW POSTER: ANCIENT GIANTS! Big heads, bigger secrets. These ancient faces know something.

Stay sharp, Villains!

title: Toy Blast
notes:
The update is ready to take off!

The farmer is asleep, and the chickens are making their move! With a clever flying machine and a dream of wheat farms, they're ready for their biggest adventure yet. Don't miss this egg-citing update!

Be sure to update to the latest version of Toy Blast for the newest content. Every 2 weeks, we bring you 50 NEW LEVELS!

Come and have fun!

title: RAID: Shadow Legends
notes:
NIEUW IN 11.67.0:

- Win Streak mode toegevoegd aan de Live arena + betere matchmaking

- 40 nieuwe edelstenen te verdienen in de Live arena

title: Archero 2
notes:
1. Added Legendary Heroes Demeter and Artemis and exclusive Skins.
2. Added Guild Raid, Camp Visit, Friendly Duel, Charm System, Titles, and Rankings.
3. Rumble Ladder S3 begins with the new 3v3 Football Rumble mode.
4. Added Gear & Rune Lock
5. Unlocked Shackled Jungle 1101-1300, Campaign 161-170, and Hard 146-155.
6. Added defensive bonuses in Peak Arena.
7. Improved Guild Expedition stats, event chat, and scoring.
8. Reduced chapter difficulty and fixed various issues.

title: Palmon: Survival
notes: Enhanced game stability and performance optimizations.

title: Truck Star Match
notes:
Klaar voor een spannende update?

- 200 nieuwe levels toegevoegd, spannende uitdagingen wachten op je!

- Repareer en modificeer de gloednieuwe trucks PowerBull-ATX en Azure Blade.

- Het nieuwe tijdelijke modificatie-evenement Frosty Fusion is live en biedt fantastische beloningen die je niet wilt missen!

- De leaderboard-functie is geoptimaliseerd, meer competities wachten op je!

Ontdek nog meer spannende content! Update nu en ervaar het zelf!
